description_long: This is a classic rural-style mailbox mounted on a sturdy, weathered wooden post. The mailbox itself is made of metal, with a slightly arched top and a front-hinged door featuring a small handle. A red metal flag is attached to the side, indicating when mail is present for pickup. The post is square in cross-section, with a decorative cap on top and a support brace beneath the mailbox for added stability. The surface of the mailbox shows signs of age and exposure, with a matte, slightly rough finish and some visible discoloration. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, suitable for outdoor placement along streets or driveways.
description: A weathered metal mailbox with a red flag, mounted on a sturdy wooden post with a support brace and decorative cap.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the mailbox door, red flag, and the full wooden post with support brace.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red flag and the length of the mailbox body atop the wooden post.
description_view_2: Rear-left view showing the back of the mailbox and the post's decorative cap, with the flag less visible.
description_view_3: Rear-right view displaying the back of the mailbox, the post, and the support brace beneath the mailbox.
